CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
